title: Algerian Garlic Shrimp Stir Fry
description: A spicy and flavorful stir fry made with garlic, shrimp, and Algerian spices. Perfect for a quick keto dinner.
instructions: Heat the avocado oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the shrimp and cook for 2-3 minutes per side until pink and cooked through.
Add the Algerian spice blend and stir to combine.
Add the dense tomatoes and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes until the tomatoes are heated through.
Optional: Add some spicy to your dish by sprinkling with red pepper flakes or sliced jalapenos.
Serve with a side of sautéed greens or a simple salad for a well-rounded meal.
